pages.title: Zaim 15min Rule
pages.body:
# Coaching Insight: The 15-Minute Rule
Between KSI meetings, I have 15-minute gaps. Started using them to capture one coaching insight each time. After a month, I had 20+ insights I'd forgotten I'd had. The system surfaces the relevant one when I need it.

pages.title: Zaim Test Pipeline
pages.body:

Just testing the pipeline works end to end. Zaim's coaching workflow.
